{{Quote|With ''real'' shooting, wouldn't be shooting ''back'', him.|Liane Trevval|<ref name="Shatterpoint (novel)">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>}}
'''Liane Trevval''', referred to as '''Chalk''', was a young [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] rebel from [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] who joined the [[Upland Liberation Front]] so that no other Korunnai women would have to endure what she had. She was large with red hair, and had extreme difficulty with speaking [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Early in life she had been molested by a squad of six [[Balawai]] militiamen; she and members of her [[ghôsh]] had hunted them down and served them ''[[tan pel'trokal]]''.

Chalk handled heavy weapons with ease, her weapon of choice a [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] [[M-40 light repeating blaster]]. She aided [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] on Haruun Kal, and died heroically in the midst of the [[Battle of Pelek Baw]]. [[General/Legends|General]] Windu promoted Chalk to [[Commanding officer/Legends|Officer]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and awarded her the [[Medal of Valor/Legends|Medal of Valor]] posthumously. Windu also took the steps of finding her real name and placing it in the Senate record. After her death, it was indicated that fellow ULF fighter [[Nick Rostu]] had feelings for her, but it is unknown if they were reciprocated. She had a [[Force-bond/Legends|force bond]] with a female [[Akk dog/Legends|Akk dog]] that she called [[Galthra]] and after her death, Galthra went mad.
